zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Champernon於1299年出生在英國戴文易爾福拉可姆時，她的父親Henry Champernon28歲，母親Joan Bodrugan20歲。她於1329年與Nicholas Bonville在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1340年在英國戴文書特享年41歲，埋葬在英國戴文阿可明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Champernon于1299年出生在英国戴文易爾福拉可姆时，她的父亲Henry Champernon28岁，母亲Joan Bodrugan20岁。她于1329年与Nicholas Bonville在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1340年在英国戴文書特享年41岁，埋葬在英国戴文阿可明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Champernon was born in 1299, in Ilfracombe, Devon, England, her father, Henry Champernon, was 28 and her mother, Joan Bodrugan, was 20. She married Nicholas Bonville in 1329, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1340, in Shute, Devon, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Axminster, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Champernon est née en 1299, à Ilfracombe, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Henry Champernon, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Bodrugan, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Bonville en 1329, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1340, à Shute, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Axminster, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Champernon 1299 in Ilfracombe, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Champernon 28 und ihre Mutter Joan Bodrugan 20. Sie hat 1329 in Devon, England Nicholas Bonville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1340 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Shute, Devon, England und wurde in Axminster, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Champernon è nata il nel 1299 nel Ilfracombe, Devon, England, sua padre, Henry Champernon, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Joan Bodrugan, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Bonville nel 1329, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1340, nel Shute, Devon, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Axminster, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Champernonが1299年にイギリスデボンイルフラコンベで生まれた時，父Henry Champernonは28歳，母Joan Bodruganは20歳であった。1329年にイギリスデボンでNicholas Bonvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1340年にイギリスデボンシュトで41歳で死去し，イギリスデボンアクスミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Champernon(이)가 1299년 영국 데폰 이프라코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Champernon(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Bodrugan(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1329년 영국 데폰에서 Nicholas Bonville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 데폰 슈트에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 액민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Champernon nasceu em 1299, em Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Champernon, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bodrugan, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Bonville em 1329, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1340, em Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Champernon родилась в 1299 г. в местности илфракомб, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Champernon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bodrugan, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Bonville в 1329 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1340 г. в местности шут, девон, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности аксминстир, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Champernon nació en 1299, en Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Champernon, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan Bodrugan, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Nicholas Bonville en 1329, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1340, en Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.
